tasks.title: BoA Agreement — Laurent's Concerns Analysis & Discussion Brief
tasks.summary: Full analysis of Laurent's two contract issues with proposed redline language, risk assessment, and escalation playbook. Laurent is right — both clauses need targeted amendments before signing.

tasks.title: Kount/Equifax Data Sharing Amendment Framework
tasks.summary: Comprehensive amendment framework to expand Velera-only restriction to open-ended issuer scope. Includes key terms, negotiation strategy, and timeline aligned to Q3 fundraise.

tasks.title: Tampa + Cayman Side Trip Logistics Research
tasks.summary: Full routing research (YVR→TPA→GCM→YYZ→YVR). Cayman Airways nonstop TPA→GCM is the money leg. ~2 days added to Tampa trip. Book now — March is peak season.

lastSummary: Three high-priority deliverables completed overnight Mar 1-2: BoA agreement analysis with redline proposals, Kount data sharing amendment framework, and Tampa-Cayman trip logistics research.
